items.p: Priority-based preemptive scheduler for ARM Cortex-M. Zero-copy IPC and minimal footprint.
Custom Yocto BSP layer for i.MX8 family. Hardened kernel and optimized systemd boot times.
Pipeline for QAT (Quantization-Aware Training) targeting low-power ESP32-S3 NPUs.
Hardware-accelerated sensor fusion visualizer using WebGL and custom GLSL shaders.
Extending the classic Doom engine to run on obscure industrial displays and bare-metal.
Educational x86_64 kernel. Implements basic paging, interrupts, and a simple VFS.
x86 Assembly, ARM Assembly, C, C++, Rust, RISC-V.
Kernel Hacking, Device Drivers, Yocto Project, Buildroot, U-Boot.
